purpose: KOV RT/legal layer manifest for automated RT metadata generation and RT XML ingest.
description: This manifest maps each municipality to its Riigi Teataja social welfare regulation URL, expected XML file and generated RT RAG metadata. RT/legal layer remains separate from the KOV web package.

xml_detection_order: single XML file in KOV folder if unambiguous
single XML file in KOV/rt folder if unambiguous
policy.auto_ingest_only_when: auto_ingest=true and local XML file is found
